prompt: Create an abstract ultra-detailed macro wallpaper showing a luminous, iridescent liquid surface, like shallow clear water mixed with pearlescent oil and glass. The scene is viewed at a low oblique angle across rippling translucent waves, with exactly four visible circular ripple vortices: one small swirl near the upper left edge, one large soft swirl in the lower left, one medium swirl just right of center, and one large spiral swirl in the upper right. Use a glowing pastel palette of aqua cyan, electric blue, lavender, violet, and hints of pink, with bright white caustic light streaks, sparkling specular highlights, and refracted rainbow edges. The brightest bloom should sit slightly left of center, fading into deeper blue shadows at the bottom and left edges and purple-blue liquid ridges on the right. Make the surface feel glossy, crystalline, fluid, and dreamlike, with fine wave textures, soft depth of field, high dynamic range lighting, and no text, people, objects, borders, or logos. Render as a cinematic horizontal 16:9 phone-or-desktop wallpaper in a photorealistic yet ethereal generative-art style.
